data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the 'Equipment on-site log'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Equipment on-site log' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an equipment log, but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status. No details or evidence were provided to assert whether the equipment log feature is implemented or functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or functionality of the equipment on-site log.
